metadata.source: Asher Mutandiro LinkedIn Posts - The Resident Review
notes: Weights reflect relative frequency of issue mentions across all ward posts
Water is the most universally mentioned issue across wards
Roads and sanitation are the second and third most common
Governance failures are cross-cutting and mentioned in nearly every post as context
No Chitungwiza or Epworth wards were covered in The Resident Review - project scope is Harare's 45 wards only
Epworth appears only in connection with Bless The Child Zimbabwe (separate initiative)
Ward 18 Colray was the only area with a positive service delivery note (road rehabilitation)
Ward 39 Dzivarasekwa was the only ward where drug abuse was specifically highlighted
Several wards had multi-part coverage: Wards 5, 7, 9, 16, 17, 18, 22, 23, 35, 37, 39
